kennelTipLean.note: Nobody's tipping us. The team drop killed whatever optimism was left — half the thread stopped reading at 'Connor Tracey'.

kennelTipQuotes.quote: Stopped reading after Connor Tracey. — Mr Shhh

debates.question: Salmon's named at 13 again after the Dolphins disaster — does he last the full 80?
debates.kennel: Half the gameday thread wants him in Reggies next to Tracey.

options.label: Benched in second half, doesn't return

debates.question: First kickable penalty in Sharks' half — what's the call?
debates.kennel: Doggies 04 begged Ciro to rip up the attacking gameplan — does that mean taking the 2 or running the set?

trivia.question: Which Bulldogs prop won the Dally M Prop of the Year in 2004, the same year the club won the premiership?
trivia.explainer: Willie Mason took out Prop of the Year in 2004, capping a huge season that ended with the Dogs lifting the trophy after beating the Roosters.

recap.question: Who racked up the most run metres for the Dogs against the Dolphins?
recap.explainer: Tuala led the Dogs with 156 run metres — though Isaako alone ran for 261 the other way, which tells you everything.

washup.headline: 44-12. At Suncorp. On a Friday night. Jesus.
washup.vibe: Got absolutely cooked by the Dolphins and it wasn't even close after half time. Isaako carved us up for 261 metres and 4 line breaks while we missed 40 tackles — read that again, 40. The completion rate was 75% to their 88%, which is basically the whole story. Sitting 13th and the wheels feel properly off.
washup.kennelSummary: The Kennel is in full meltdown mode. Tracey's getting buried, Salmon's getting buried, Hayward's getting buried, and a sizeable chunk just want Ciro and Gus gone by next week. Nate DAWG called the meltdown 4 hours before kickoff and was bang on.

kennelHotTakes.quote: That's the most pathetic fullback performance I've ever seen from a Bulldogs fullback. Send him to Super League, swap him for Jai Field or Bevan French — we need speed.
kennelHotTakes.author: Imposter404 / Kempsey Dog

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Round 11 vs Sharks Friday 6pm Suncorp (Magic Round)
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: The gameday thread's already 800+ deep and most of it is bagging the team list. DogsOfWar reckons Xerri has to mark Talakai or we're cooked.

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Mitch Woods
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: 204 replies of 'just play him' vs 'he hasn't earned it'. Dogmonster's watched him in Reggies and says don't get excited.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Tracey?Time to go
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: After the Dolphins shellacking the Tracey-out brigade is back in full voice. Multiple posters want Crichton at fullback, one bloke wants to swap him for Bevan French.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Is Gus actually the real problem?
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: 393 replies of fans turning on Gould. Silva reckons Barrett's too soft and crumbles when it gets tough, others say Gus has to act on the coach this week or he's done too.
